content => string (440) "Results-driven Computer Science graduate with demonstrated experience in doc...
$value['content']
Results-driven Computer Science graduate with demonstrated experience in document management, inventory control, and administrative support. Adept at maintaining accurate records, organizing operational workflows, and delivering consistent output in structured work environments. Combines a strong technical foundation with practical problem-solving skills, and is committed to contributing value from day one in any organizational setting.
